summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Iteration 57 - Infrastructure Expansion. All 24 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend verified Stock Trading page with live prices, CGT calculations, and demo mode. New features: Real-time stock prices via yfinance (LIVE), Email service via SendGrid (DEMO MODE), Basiq CDR bank feeds (DEMO MODE), Broker API infrastructure (DEMO MODE).

issues: Important Information modal appears on every page load - consider adding 'Don't show again' option or storing user acknowledgment

critical_code_review_comments: Real-time stock prices via yfinance working correctly with 5-minute caching
Email service properly configured with SendGrid templates (trade_confirmation, portfolio_alert, daily_digest)
Basiq CDR integration supports 12 Australian banks with full transaction/income/expense analysis
Broker API infrastructure ready for OpenMarkets, SelfWealth, Interactive Brokers, and generic broker
All services correctly indicate demo_mode=true when API keys not configured
Stock Trading page displays live prices with is_live=true flag
CGT calculations and tax planning opportunities working correctly

success_rate.frontend: 100% (Stock Trading page verified, all features working)

seed_data_creation: None - uses mock data for demo mode services
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 57 adds major infrastructure: 1) Real-time stock prices via yfinance (LIVE data), 2) Email service via SendGrid (DEMO MODE - requires SENDGRID_API_KEY), 3) Basiq CDR bank feeds (DEMO MODE - requires BASIQ_API_KEY), 4) Broker API infrastructure (DEMO MODE - requires broker API keys). Key new endpoints: /api/market/* for live prices, /api/email/* for notifications, /api/bank-feeds/* for CDR integration. All demo mode services return realistic mock data.
